basic_details.job_title: CNCI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Assistant and Data Entry Operator Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Assistant and Data Entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: The Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute (CNCI) has officially announced the Project Assistant and Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings under Advertisement No. 020/2026. Candidates aged up to 35 years for Project Assistant and up to 25 years for Data Entry Operator, holding a Graduate or Master's Degree, can attend the walk-in interview on 07 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and view the walk-in interview details are shared below.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Project Assistant, Max 25 years for Data Entry Operator
age_limit.details: Project Assistant: Maximum 35 years Data Entry Operator: Maximum 25 years

qualification.details: Project Assistant: Graduate in Sociology/Anthropology/Social Sciences/Medical Social Work/Psychology with 03 Years experience in a relevant field from a recognized Institution OR Master's Degree in Sociology/Anthropology/Social Sciences/Medical Social Work/Psychology. Candidates with field experience/scientific proposal writing experience/knowledge of Statistical Tools/Proficiency in Computers/Health Research Studies/Experience in data collection and handling will be preferred. Data Entry Operator: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University/Institute. Typing speed of 8000 Key depressions per hour on Computer.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 31000/- per month, Rs. 17000/- per month

rows.chittaranjan_national_cancer_institute_c: Project Assistant and Data Entry Operator
Rs. 31000/- per month, Rs. 17000/- per month
Max 35 years for Project Assistant, Max 25 years for Data Entry Operator

content_sections.heading: CNCI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CNCI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CNCI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CNCI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: Graduate in Sociology/Anthropology/Social Sciences/Medical Social Work/Psychology with 03 Years experience in a relevant field from a recognized Institution OR Master's Degree in Sociology/Anthropology/Social Sciences/Medical Social Work/Psychology. Candidates with field experience/scientific proposal writing experience/knowledge of Statistical Tools/Proficiency in Computers/Health Research Studies/Experience in data collection and handling will be preferred. Data Entry Operator: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University/Institute. Typing speed of 8000 Key depressions per hour on Computer.

content_sections.heading: CNCI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: Maximum 35 years Data Entry Operator: Maximum 25 years

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CNCI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CNCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Assistant and Data Entry Operator posts at CNCI is scheduled for 07 July 2026. Candidates should report at the venue within the specified reporting time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant position, candidates need a Graduate degree in Sociology, Anthropology, Social Sciences, Medical Social Work, or Psychology with 3 years of relevant experience, or a Master's degree in the same fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Data Entry Operator post is 25 years as of the notification date.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant and Data Entry Operator posts?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant post and one vacancy for the Data Entry Operator post, totaling 2 vacancies in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the CNCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 200/- for EWS category candidates. Women and PWBD candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the walk-in interview is between 10:00 AM and 12:30 PM on 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at CNCI 2nd Campus, Street No-299, DJ Block, Action Area-1D, Newtown, Kolkata-700160.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for detailed information.
